description_long: This helmet features a robust, futuristic design with a two-tone color scheme: a metallic gray shell covers the rear and sides, while the front and top are finished in a glossy, copper-brown surface with a speckled reflective pattern. The helmet's exterior is angular and armored, with pronounced geometric contours and reinforced cheek and jaw sections. The rear of the helmet is solid and rounded, with hexagonal and circular indents suggesting reinforced impact zones. The sides display raised, polygonal details and a large, black circular element near the ear area, possibly for communication or audio integration. The front is smooth and uninterrupted, lacking a visible visor or face opening, indicating a full-coverage protective design. The overall construction suggests a high level of durability, suitable for urban tactical or industrial use.
description: A futuristic, armored helmet with a metallic gray shell and a glossy, copper-brown front, featuring angular contours and reinforced side elements.
description_view_0: Front view shows the smooth, glossy copper-brown faceplate with a speckled reflective pattern and no visible visor or openings.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the transition between the copper-brown front and the metallic gray shell, with pronounced angular details and a large black circular element near the ear.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals a solid metallic gray surface with hexagonal and circular indents, emphasizing the helmet's reinforced structure.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the same angular features, color transition, and black circular element near the ear.
attribute_graphic_design: The helmet features a speckled, reflective pattern on the copper-brown front and top, with the rest of the shell in solid metallic gray; no additional graphics or motifs are present.
